form.formComment: Comes off a 34 day let-up. At the latest run was well back until straightening; raced back then made ground from the turn; won by a nose at this track March 8 over 1207m defeating Infastuation with 56kg at $3.30. Before that 4th of 7 at Aqueduct on February 5 over 1308m, 5 len behind Maggie T carrying 55kg at $6.61. Won last start and is well-placed again.
